burden.dalyPerCapita: high per-case disability; ICU needs in severe cases
burden.mortalityRate: Low to moderate (3-7% in severe cases)

vulnerablePopulations: patients with recent GI or respiratory infection
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Progressive symmetric weakness and areflexia; CSF albuminocytologic dissociation; EMG/NCS

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with early IVIG or plasmapheresis

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Neurology evaluation with access to EMG and CSF analysis
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: IVIG or plasmapheresis; ICU support for respiratory failure
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access to ICU beds during seasonal peaks
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Established protocols and access to immunotherapy
